title: platostoma denticulatum
intro: Platostoma denticulatum, also known as African blue sage, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Platostoma denticulatum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
